Checks if the bottom left corner is covered by another face.

Checks if the bottom right corner is covered by another face.

isCoveredTR() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model.Face

isOverlapped() - Method in class it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.Model.GoldFront
Returns whether the scoring for this card is based on covered corners or visible objects on the play area.
